headline: Marriott International Expands Luxury Portfolio in Peru Through Landmark Conversions
summary: * Two existing Lima hotels will rebrand as The Ritz-Carlton and JW Marriott in 2028, marking significant luxury expansion in Peru's capital.* The two properties in Lima are set to officially join The...

headline: Marriott International to convert two Lima hotels; The repositioned JW Marriott Hotel Lima aligns with Marriott International's initiative to grow its luxury portfolio.
summary: Salong Debbarma -Marriott International has announced the conversion of two hotels in Lima, Peru, adding them to its luxury brand portfolio, with both properties expected for completion in 2028.The...
